rules.applies_to: structured entity metadata in licensed namespaces
rules.scope_note: Structured data only; preserve provenance as project policy.
Other text namespaces are excluded.
Resolve a separate Commons file-level rule; never inherit Wikidata CC0.

rules.applies_to: Structured Data on Commons file statements
rules.scope_note: Unstructured file-page text is excluded.

rules.attribution_template: Credit page authors and Wikimedia Commons; mark adaptations.
rules.scope_note: Historic GFDL combinations require record-level review.

rules.applies_to: each individual file page and revision
rules.attribution_template: Use the exact file-page author, license version, link, and change notice.
rules.scope_note: Uploader claim requires rights review; no site-level inheritance.

rules.attribution_template: Getty Research Institute, Union List of Artist Names (ULAN).
rules.scope_note: Retain contributing institutions and source provenance.

rules.attribution_template: Getty Research Institute, ULAN; mark changes.
rules.scope_note: Does not license artworks or prove attribution/influence.
ULAN is not an artwork-media source.

rules.attribution_template: Getty Research Institute, Thesaurus of Geographic Names (TGN).
rules.scope_note: Retain source provenance and state that TGN coordinates are approximate finding aids.

rules.attribution_template: Getty Research Institute, TGN; mark changes and coordinate-precision interpretation.
rules.scope_note: TGN identities and reference coordinates do not prove exact sites, borders, jurisdiction, travel, or influence.
TGN is not an artwork-media source.
Record retrieved_at and changed fields.
Website content outside OA data is excluded.

rules.attribution_template: Use object-level credit requested by The Met.
rules.scope_note: primaryImage alone is not an OA selector.
Credit provider, aggregator, and Europeana as project policy.
Object bytes and previews are excluded.

rules.applies_to: digital object, preview, thumbnail, and IIIF resource selected by edm:rights
rules.attribution_template: Follow edm:rights and original provider object-level credit.
rules.scope_note: Missing edm:rights is unknown and blocked.

scope_match.pattern: ^digital\ object,\ preview,\ thumbnail,\ and\ IIIF\ resource\ selected\ by\ edm:rights$

rules.applies_to: Open Access and basic restricted-object metadata explicitly offered as CC0
rules.scope_note: Retain unit and object provenance.

scope_match.pattern: ^Open\ Access\ and\ basic\ restricted\-object\ metadata\ explicitly\ offered\ as\ CC0$

rules.applies_to: records with an explicit Smithsonian CC0 indication
rules.attribution_template: Credit the Smithsonian unit and object when requested.
rules.scope_note: Restricted/culturally sensitive records are excluded.

scope_match.pattern: ^records\ with\ an\ explicit\ Smithsonian\ CC0\ indication$

rules.attribution_template: Use the object-level Smithsonian credit.
rules.scope_note: No CC0 marker means no media rule match.

rules.applies_to: each linked-data or API record rights statement
rules.attribution_template: Follow the record-level PDM, CC0, or CC BY credit.
rules.scope_note: No inheritance across records.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ linked\-data\ or\ API\ record\ rights\ statement$

rules.applies_to: each object, vocabulary, exhibition, or library record
rules.attribution_template: Follow record-level rights and Rijksmuseum requested credit.
rules.scope_note: Schema evolution does not change stored rights evidence.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ object,\ vocabulary,\ exhibition,\ or\ library\ record$

rules.attribution_template: Use the object-level rights holder, license, and credit.
rules.scope_note: Technically accessible IIIF is not a license.
Courtesy credit encouraged.

rules.applies_to: official open-data CSV tables and dictionary
rules.scope_note: Image URLs are references only.

rules.applies_to: object-page image explicitly designated Open Access/CC0
rules.attribution_template: Courtesy National Gallery of Art, Washington, with object caption.
rules.scope_note: CSV image URL alone never matches this rule.
Does not apply to articles or other endpoints.
Selector is endpoint and field specific.

rules.attribution_template: Art Institute of Chicago; field-level CC BY 4.0; mark changes.
rules.scope_note: Attribution must survive extraction into static data.

rules.applies_to: IIIF/object media with CC0 Public Domain Designation
rules.attribution_template: Use the standard object caption and object-level rights statement.
rules.scope_note: IIIF reachability or is_public_domain alone is insufficient without object evidence.

scope_match.pattern: ^IIIF/object\ media\ with\ CC0\ Public\ Domain\ Designation$

rules.scope_note: Record retrieved_at and source hash.
Third-party rights can remain outside the dataset grant.

rules.applies_to: object media with share_license_status=CC0 and object-level evidence
rules.attribution_template: Use the Cleveland Museum of Art object credit.
rules.scope_note: No CC0 status means no match.

scope_match.pattern: ^object\ media\ with\ share_license_status=CC0\ and\ object\-level\ evidence$

rules.attribution_template: Catalogue of Life release, DOI, and contributing dataset.
rules.scope_note: Record release and merged flag.

rules.attribution_template: Catalogue of Life release, DOI, and contributing dataset; mark changes.
rules.scope_note: XR programmatic merges retain upstream provenance.
The checklist license does not license webpage media.

rules.attribution_template: Cite dataset or download DOI and publisher.
rules.scope_note: Allowed licenses include CC0, CC BY, and CC BY-NC.

rules.applies_to: each occurrence/taxon/event record and dataset license
rules.attribution_template: Preserve publisher and cite dataset/download DOI.
rules.scope_note: CC BY-NC records do not match commercial-use releases.

rules.applies_to: each multimedia extension record and provider statement
rules.attribution_template: Follow provider media license and credit independently of occurrence data.
rules.scope_note: Free-text or missing media rights are unknown and blocked.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ multimedia\ extension\ record\ and\ provider\ statement$

rules.applies_to: each EOL data object and provider attribution
rules.attribution_template: Retain the original content provider, license, and EOL link.
rules.scope_note: Page-level inheritance is forbidden.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ EOL\ data\ object\ and\ provider\ attribution$

rules.applies_to: each trait/text/interaction object; Overview auto-summary separately CC0
rules.attribution_template: Follow each object license and provider attribution.
rules.scope_note: Mixed CC/PD terms require object filters.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ trait/text/interaction\ object;\ Overview\ auto\-summary\ separately\ CC0$

rules.attribution_template: Follow the media object license, rights holder, and provider.
rules.scope_note: Missing machine-readable rights are unknown.

rules.attribution_template: Global Biotic Interactions and original study/dataset.
rules.scope_note: Retain original citation chain.

rules.attribution_template: GloBI snapshot DOI and original study/dataset; mark changes.
rules.scope_note: Does not by itself approve behavior animation.
GloBI is not a media source.

rules.applies_to: IUCN Red List assessment metadata and API response fields
rules.attribution_template: IUCN Red List assessment, version, date, and required citation.
rules.scope_note: Public static redistribution requires written permission; source links alone remain allowed.

scope_match.pattern: ^IUCN\ Red\ List\ assessment\ metadata\ and\ API\ response\ fields$

rules.applies_to: API responses, assessment text, range data, maps, and spatial downloads
rules.attribution_template: Use only within the exact written permission scope.
rules.scope_note: No public bytes until permission_status=approved with scope/reference.

scope_match.pattern: ^API\ responses,\ assessment\ text,\ range\ data,\ maps,\ and\ spatial\ downloads$

rules.applies_to: species images and other donated media
rules.attribution_template: Obtain permission directly from the identified rights holder.
rules.scope_note: IUCN usually cannot license donated images.

rules.attribution_template: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017; cite authors/source and mark changes.
rules.scope_note: Record framework year and geometry version.

rules.applies_to: downloaded Ecoregions 2017 Shapefile geometry and attributes
rules.attribution_template: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017; cite source and mark simplification.
rules.scope_note: Webpage imagery and basemaps are excluded.
Dataset license does not transfer to media/basemap.
Dataset content license remains separate.

rules.applies_to: each dataset license; core collection-specimens is CC0
rules.attribution_template: Use the dataset citation and record-level version URL/DOI.
rules.scope_note: License not specified is unknown and blocked.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ dataset\ license;\ core\ collection\-specimens\ is\ CC0$

rules.applies_to: each dataset media rule; collection-specimen images are CC BY 4.0
rules.attribution_template: Natural History Museum, London; dataset/object credit and license.
rules.scope_note: Do not inherit core collection image terms into other datasets.

scope_match.pattern: ^each\ dataset\ media\ rule;\ collection\-specimen\ images\ are\ CC\ BY\ 4\.0$
